title: From Lead to Deal to Delivery: Turning your monday Workspace into a Unified Growth Engine
excerpt:

posts.author: MickaylaM (Mickayla Murray)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’re already using monday Work Management to get work done. But if your sales data lives in one place and your delivery execution lives in another, your revenue is likely leaking through the cracks.

We’re hosting an exclusive webinar on the 26th of March to show you how monday CRM turns your existing workspace into an AI-powered, unified revenue engine.

What we’ll cover:
–An overview into why customer journeys break and how to fix them
–Standardize execution across the entire customer lifecycle
–A live deep-dive into monday’s AI-powered platform
